chapter_title.en: The Location of the Grave of the Commander of the Faithful, Imam Ali Ibn Abi Talib {a.s}

text:
[زيارة قبور الشهداء]
فإذا أردت زيارة قبور الشهداء فقل: " السلام عليكم بما صبرتم فنعم عقبى الدار.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
VISITING THE GRAVES OF THE MARTYRS
When you wish to visit the graves of the martyrs, say:
"Peace be upon you for your patience; how excellent is the final abode."
